---
title: "Gap-free Information Transfer in 4D-STEM via Fusion of Complementary Scattering Channels"
type: "article"
author: "S. You, G. Varnavides, S. Khavnekar, N. Palatkin, S. Shao, M. Wu, D. G. Stroppa, D. Chernikova, B. Zhu, R. Egoavil, S. Vespucci, X. Ye, F. K. M. Schur, E. Spiecker, P. Pelz"
year: "2025"
publication: "arXiv (Cornell University)"
preprint: ""
doi: "10.48550/arxiv.2512.19460"
materials: ""
code_url: ""
project_page_url: ""
toc: false
categories:
  - electron microscopy
  - physics
---

## Citation (APA 7)

> Gap-free Information Transfer in 4D-STEM via Fusion of Complementary Scattering Channels
S. You, G. Varnavides, S. Khavnekar, N. Palatkin, S. Shao, M. Wu, D. G. Stroppa, D. Chernikova, B. Zhu, R. Egoavil, S. Vespucci, X. Ye, F. K. M. Schur, E. Spiecker, P. Pelz
arXiv (Cornell University)


## Abstract

[Abstract will be added manually]
